summary: Looks like LG monitors started pushing adware software to Windows. Even some older monitors. So if you have one you might want to search if they installed it on your computer. https:// gizmodo.com/lg-monitors-fill-p cs-with-adware-and-its-not-just-recent-displays-2000787737
content:
Looks like LG monitors started pushing adware software to Windows. Even some older monitors. So if you have one you might want to search if they installed it on your computer.
